message:
fix(tests): prevent vault_test from corrupting real auth files

CRITICAL BUG FIX: createFakeAuthFiles() was writing fake tokens to
the user's REAL ~/.codex/auth.json and ~/.claude.json files instead
of using the temp directory.

The bug: os.Getenv("HOME") returns the real home directory, and since
$HOME is always set on Unix systems, the fallback to tmpDir never
triggered.

This caused users running tests to have their real auth files
overwritten with {"token":"fake-token"}, breaking their Claude Code
and Codex logins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
